description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three testing jobs (test:jdk11, test:jdk17, test:jdk8) in the testing stage, each using a Maven Docker image for the respective JDK (maven:3.6-openjdk-11-slim, maven:3.8-openjdk-17-slim, maven:3.6-openjdk-8-slim). All jobs share a before_script that runs `apt update && apt install -y zip unzip`, a script that creates `.m2/repository`, runs `mvn ${MAVEN_CLI_OPTS} ${MAVEN_NO_PACKAGING} ${MAVEN_NO_TESTS} install -Pgenerator-java`, then `mvn ${MAVEN_CLI_OPTS} ${MAVEN_NO_PACKAGING} verify -Plib,cli,reporting` and finally processes the JaCoCo CSV with an awk command, and an after_script that removes the Providence repository. The test:jdk11 job also defines artifacts that expire in 12 hours, include all files under reporting/target/site/, and publish JUnit XML reports from */target/surefire-reports/TEST-*.xml. A pages job runs in the post-release stage on the master branch, depends on test:jdk11, uses the mkdocs Docker image, cleans the public directory, builds the site with `mkdocs build`, moves the site to public and copies the aggregated JaCoCo report, and publishes the public/ folder as an artifact. The pipeline caches the Maven repository at .m2/repository keyed by the project name, skips all jobs when the commit message matches `[silent-ignore]` or `[maven-release-plugin]`, and sets Maven options via variables.
